name: Golden Coast Residences
description: Beachside apartments and duplexes on the New Golden Mile, close to everyday services and suited to personal use or rental.
seoDescription: Explore Golden Coast Residences, with beachside apartments and duplexes on the New Golden Mile from EUR 495,000.
twitterDescription: Beachside apartments and duplexes on the New Golden Mile, close to Estepona and everyday services.

contact.whatsappMessage: Hello Nueva Living, I would like to speak with an advisor about Golden Coast Residences.

hero.alt: Golden Coast Residences beachside apartment terrace and coastal living preview

architecture.alt: Contemporary Mediterranean interior opening toward outdoor living space
architecture.caption: Beachside indoor-outdoor living

privateViewing.alt: Beachside residential atmosphere with Mediterranean light

quickFacts: Current price list confirmed by request

copy: Golden Coast Residences is for buyers who want to be near the beach and have a home that is easy to use, whether for holidays, longer stays or rental.
The New Golden Mile is quieter than central Marbella, while beaches, restaurants, services and Estepona are still close by.

why.copy: This project suits buyers who want a practical home near the beach without paying central Marbella prices.
points: Holiday-home and second-home buyers who want beach access without ultra-prime pricing.
It combines beach access, nearby services and a home that is easy to look after.
The New Golden Mile has good beach access, improving services and easy links to Estepona.
The best choice depends on the terrace, direction, floor and which homes are currently released.

copy: The architecture makes the most of Mediterranean light, outdoor space and easy day-to-day living.
Open living areas connect naturally to the terraces, making the homes work well for both short visits and longer stays.
highlights: Terraces arranged for dining, shade and coastal air.
Apartment and duplex options for different needs.
Shared amenities designed to be easy to enjoy and maintain.

residences.copy: The homes are designed for buyers who want beach access, sensible layouts and good outdoor space. Ask us for the latest sizes and availability.

items.name: Apartments
features: Terraces for dining and seasonal living.

items.name: Duplex Residences
features: More separation for family or guests.

items.name: Selected Penthouses
features: Potential sea-view orientation depending on release.

privateViewing.headlineHtml: Take a closer look at Golden Coast
privateViewing.copy: Get the latest project information and let us walk you through the home types, directions and current availability.
insights: Beach access, nearby services and an easy holiday-home setup.
Apartments, duplexes and selected upper-level homes.
Any rental plan should be checked against the exact home, position and local rules.
Request the latest price list and floorplans.

lifestyle.headlineHtml: Beachside life on the New Golden Mile
lifestyle.copy: The appeal is simple: the beach, restaurants, services and Estepona are all nearby, in an area that is easy for international owners to reach and enjoy.
panels: The beach and everyday services are close enough to make regular stays easy.
Apartments and duplexes suit buyers who want a home that is simple to manage.
Better infrastructure and improvements in Estepona continue to make the wider area more attractive.

location.headlineHtml: The New Golden Mile, between Estepona and Marbella
location.copy: The New Golden Mile is known for beach access, improving services and a growing choice of new homes. It also gives you easy road links towards both Estepona and Marbella.

investment.copy: Demand is supported by the coastal location and the practical style of the homes. Rental results will still depend on local rules, the season, management and the exact home you choose.
cards: Early access can improve unit selection, especially for better terraces and orientations.
Availability and payment terms should be confirmed before you compare options.
Beach access and practical layouts can help the homes remain attractive to future buyers.
The homes may work for both personal stays and selected rental periods, subject to local rules.

trustDossier.headlineHtml: The information you need before you view
trustDossier.copy: We confirm the latest prices, available homes, floorplans and expected delivery before you arrange a viewing or reserve.
cards: We compare direction, floor level and terrace quality.
We explain the reservation, payment schedule and legal checks before you commit.
We discuss rental potential carefully and never promise returns.
We can compare Golden Coast with other coastal projects that match what you need.

items: Receive current units, price list and floorplans.
Review layouts, terraces and how you plan to use the home.
Arrange a site or digital viewing once the right units are identified.
Confirm legal, payment and delivery details before you proceed.

projectFile.copy: Ask us for the latest documents, prices and available homes.
documents: Current released units and guide pricing
Shared amenities and the full site layout

availability.copy: Availability can change quickly. We confirm the latest prices, floorplans and reservation status before a private viewing.

enquiry.copy: Ask for current availability, floorplans or a private viewing. We will send the information that is relevant to you.
enquiry.message: I would like to receive the latest information for Golden Coast Residences, including current availability, prices, floorplans and viewing options.
enquiry.sentMessage: Thank you. We have received your Golden Coast enquiry and will be in touch.
